name: My Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the pumpkin, brown it by buttering a heavy cast iron frying pan and cooking 2 cups of pumpkin over medium heat, stirring and turning until all parts are dry. Reduce to 1 1/2 cups. Mix with 3 tablespoons of flour and brown sugar.
Scald milk. Add cream, cinnamon, ginger, and nutmeg to the milk mixture. Pour over the pumpkin mixture. Beat in eggs until well mixed.
Line pie plates with dough, ensuring it is well built up around the edges. Mix together 2 tablespoons of sugar, the remaining tablespoon of flour, and a pinch of spice. Sprinkle evenly on the bottom crusts, spreading all over with fingertips to prevent sogginess.
Fill shells about 3/4 full. Place strips of foil around the edge and bake in a preheated oven at 450°F for 15 minutes. Reduce heat to 325°F and continue baking for 30 more minutes. The pie is done when it shakes just in the middle when moved back and forth. Serve hot or cold.
